{{CargoRelic
|name=Order of Britland
|class_id=20821
|rank=Blue
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This is one of the orders of chivalry established by the King of Britland. The Order's motto is: For God and the Empire. It is the lowest class of appointment and the appointed members come from a wide range of classes.
|fame=30
|art=30
|fth=27
|civ=20
|tech=48
|ss1=All equipped Organs, skill DMG +5%<br>Per 5 organ gene locks unlocked, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 5 organ gene locks unlocked, Snail HP +50<br>Organ's Gene Locks unlocked:200/200
|ss2=All equipped Organs, skill DMG +5%<br>Per 5 organ gene locks unlocked, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 5 organ gene locks unlocked, Snail HP +50<br>Organ's Gene Locks unlocked:200/200
|ss3=All equipped Organs, skill DMG +5%<br>Per 5 organ gene locks unlocked, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 5 organ gene locks unlocked, Snail HP +50<br>Organ's Gene Locks unlocked:200/200
|ss4=All equipped Organs, skill DMG +5%<br>Per 5 organ gene locks unlocked, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 5 organ gene locks unlocked, Snail HP +50<br>Organ's Gene Locks unlocked:200/200
|ss7=All equipped Organs, skill DMG +5%<br>Per 5 organ gene locks unlocked, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 5 organ gene locks unlocked, Snail HP +50<br>Organ's Gene Locks unlocked:200/200<br>All equipped Organs, skill DMG +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Timemachine skill I.png|50px]]Place in Time Machine: Travel Speedup Output +5%
}}
